title: Introducing the Cookie Recipe
description: The founding manifesto of Cookie Chain, explaining how a community-driven blockchain emerged through resilience, builders, and shared belief.
summary: The origin story and community philosophy behind Cookie Chain.

title: The Cookie Chain Cookbook
description: Official onboarding guide for bridging assets from Solana to Cookie Chain.
summary: Migration guide for new Cookie Chain users.

title: Monumental Update: Hyperlane Bridge Leaves Beta
description: The Cookie Chain bridge now supports instant Hyperlane Warp Route transfers.

title: Liquid Staking on Cookie Chain Is Live
description: Cookie Chain launched liquid staking, letting users stake COOK and receive liquid bCOOK while earning dripped staking rewards over 12 months.
summary: Liquid staking with bCOOK is now live on Cookie Chain.

title: Introducing Cookie Jar Buybacks
description: Cookie Chain announced that 25% of Pump.fun creator fee revenue will fund COOK buybacks for the community-owned Cookie Jar treasury.
summary: A new buyback program directs creator fee revenue into the Cookie Jar treasury.

title: Third Buyback and Hyperlane Transfer Completed
description: Cookie Chain completed its third 10M COOK buyback and successfully transferred 1M COOK through the in-development Hyperlane Warp Bridge.
summary: The Cookie Jar reached 30M+ COOK while Hyperlane bridge testing succeeded.

title: Second Cookie Jar Buyback Completed
description: Cookie Chain purchased 10 million COOK from the market, bridged it to Cookie Chain, and added it to the Cookie Jar treasury.
summary: The second 10M COOK buyback was added to the Cookie Jar treasury.

title: Why Did We Choose Pump.fun?
description: Cookie Chain shared an article explaining why Pump.fun was selected as part of its launch and ecosystem strategy.
summary: An article explains the reasoning behind choosing Pump.fun.

title: Cookie Chain Listed on CoinGecko as a Blockchain
description: Cookie Chain is now listed on CoinGecko as a blockchain, alongside its existing DeFiLlama tracking.
summary: CoinGecko now tracks Cookie Chain as a blockchain.

title: Cookie Chain COOK Listed on CoinGecko
description: Cookie Chain announced that COOK is listed on CoinGecko, marking another milestone for the Solana-based community chain.
summary: COOK is now listed on CoinGecko.
